feature_tested: Scenario Branch Explorer - Multi-step decision tree analysis tool
summary: Comprehensive testing of the new Branch Explorer feature. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all key elements verified including step editors, scenario type dropdowns, run branch execution, verdict badges, cumulative impact grid, AI analysis narrative, decision path visualization, expandable nodes, and branch history.

endpoints: POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Run multi-step branch with 3 steps (banquet_change, labor_adjustment, menu_price_change)
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Verify compounding effects (each step builds on modified baseline)
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Verify summary contains verdict (FAVORABLE/UNFAVORABLE), ebitda_change_pct, cumulative_deltas
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Verify nodes contain step_deltas and cumulative_state
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Error handling: empty steps list
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - Error handling: unknown scenario type in steps
POST /api/echoai3/simulation/branch - All 6 scenario types work in branch
Branch uses same baseline as individual simulation

verified_elements: Cumulative impact grid (Revenue, Food Cost, Labor, EBITDA, Covers)
Decision Path section with BASELINE node
Expandable step nodes with cumulative state details
Branch history drawer with previous branches
ui_features_verified: Branch Explorer panel loads from sidebar under Analytics & AI section
Add Scenario Step button adds step editors with correct fields
Step editors show scenario type dropdown with 6 options
Changing scenario type updates parameter fields dynamically
Run Branch button executes and shows results
Verdict badge shows FAVORABLE (green) or UNFAVORABLE (red) with percentage
Cumulative impact grid shows all 5 metrics with deltas
AI Analysis section displays GPT-4.1-mini generated narrative
Decision Path shows BASELINE → Step nodes with delta values
Step nodes are expandable to show cumulative state details (revenue, food_cost, labor_cost, ebitda)
Expanded nodes show Food %, Labor %, Covers metrics
Branch history section shows previous branches with verdict and step count
Clicking history item loads that branch's results

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test branches during testing (TEST_Three_Step_Branch, TEST_Compounding_Effects, TEST_Favorable_Verdict, TEST_Node_Structure, TEST_Retrieve_Branch, TEST_All_Scenarios, TEST_Narrative, UI Test Branch)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Explorer is fully functional. The /api/echoai3/simulation/branch endpoint chains multiple simulator functions sequentially, updating the baseline between steps. Previous branches are stored in ai3_branches MongoDB collection. The frontend panel is accessible via sidebar under Analytics & AI > Branch Explorer. AI narratives are generated via GPT-4.1-mini using Emergent LLM Key (empty string fallback if LLM fails). Toast POS and QuickBooks integrations remain MOCKED with demo/sandbox data.
notes: All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified with Playwright automation. The Branch Explorer correctly implements multi-step decision tree analysis with compounding effects, verdict calculation, and AI narrative generation.
